method: Scales, corner weights, ride heights, and measured alignment.
data_required: Mass, corner weights, CG estimate if available, toe, camber, ride height.
pass_condition: The as-built vehicle.yml matches measured values, or documented deltas are entered before model-correlation claims are made.

method: Straight-line acceleration and braking tests with wheel speed and brake pressure.
data_required: Ax, speed, wheel speed, brake pressure, throttle/torque request.
pass_condition: Accel/brake magnitudes and limiting behavior match GGV trends within a reviewed tolerance.

method: ISO 4138 slow-ramp steady-state circular-driving correlation matching the SteadyStateEval maneuver.
data_required: Ay, yaw rate, steer angle, speed, roll, radius if available, tire temperatures.
pass_condition: Understeer/roll trends, lateral limit, and steering demand are directionally correlated.

method: ISO 7401 lateral transient correlation using handwheel-angle step response plus handwheel-angle frequency-response functions.
data_required: Handwheel angle, yaw rate, ay, speed, gain, phase, lag, overshoot, fit quality.
pass_condition: Yaw/ay gain, phase, lag, and overshoot are consistent with TransientEval trends.

method: A/B sweeps for camber, rear bar, aero/rake, and tire pressure.
data_required: Response deltas, driver comments, tire temperatures, lap segments.
pass_condition: Measured response directions agree with tornado/Pearson/refined-surface trends.

data_required: Lap consistency, tire temperatures, degradation, driver confidence, faults.
pass_condition: Chosen design region remains predictable and repeatable beyond a peak-lap condition.
